creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
As announced a year ago, all support for UnrealIRCd 3.2.x will stop after December 31, 2016 [1]


All UnrealIRCd versions up to and including 4.0.14 can be crashed by a remote user ... <snip> [2]

UnrealIRCd 4.0.18 (stable) is now available for download. This is a recommended upgrade because it fixes some memory leaks / security issues present in 4.0.17 and earlier version [3]

The above security issues should have VuXML entries added (in addition to the 5.x update).

[1] https://forums.unrealircd.org/viewtopic.php?f=1&t=8629
[2] https://forums.unrealircd.org/viewtopic.php?f=1&t=8751
[3] https://forums.unrealircd.org/viewtopic.php?f=1&t=8821
